## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on progress and next steps for Lovable Templates project](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress on categories UI, template creation, and website duplication](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Focus on delivering 3-5 high-quality blog templates to benchmark quality with Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Immediate goals: finalize categories UI, productize gallery, and publish approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

## Topics

### Categories and UI Progress

  - [Georgemaine implemented new categories with labels and icons](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Hierarchy, breadcrumbs, and routing functionality working](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [UI polish to be completed today and handed off to Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

### Template Creation Workflow

  - [Exploring more efficient workflow using Tailwind UI components and Dribbble inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Nicolas working on refining the AI-driven template generation process](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Aim to create 3-5 high-quality blog templates for quality calibration](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

### Website Duplication and Publishing

  - [Nicolas duplicated Lovable's website, including blog section](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [New /guides section to be created, mirroring blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Three approved articles ready for publication, 7-8 more in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Publishing process: manually add Markdown files to repo (for now)](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Template Showcase Strategy

  - [Initially, templates will be showcased in website footer, not main navigation](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Decision on prominent placement pending Lovable's approval of template quality](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Project Management and Communication

  - [Team to send incremental updates to Lovable for faster feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Upcoming update to include template examples, gallery experience, and blog/guides progress](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Awaiting DCAP access to streamline template data uploading process](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### Workload and Long-term Strategy

  - [Current pace is good, focus on maintaining template quality](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Exploring options to outsource template creation to expert contractors in the future](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine: Finalize categories UI and hand off to Nicolas; create 3-5 blog templates](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Nicolas: Productize gallery, duplicate blog into /guides section, publish approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [George: Package and send update to Lovable (template links, gallery experience, editorial progress)](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Team: Continue pushing for DCAP access to improve workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Prepare comprehensive update for Wednesday meeting with Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/xEFq3Xf8ZM2veod7zuVt3n9bjktbFuQL?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
